mano_cua.result_summary: Export SVG 按钮点击后报 TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'exportSvg')，SVG 未下载。根因：CDN 资源（d3.v7.min.js 等）因代理连接失败无法加载，chart 对象未初始化。组织架构图未渲染
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Export SVG button found and clicked. TypeError thrown: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'exportSvg') at tree.html:87. Root cause: CDN resources (d3.v7.min.js, d3-flextree.js) failed to load due to ERR_PROXY_CONNECTION_FAILED. Chart object never initialized. No SVG download triggered.
